untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of 'fundamental thesis of deterioration' and 'thesis fundamentally disproven', which are qualitative, forward-looking fundamental assessments not expressible in price/technical indicators. The 52-week high condition cannot be directly expressed using the allowed indicators (no explicit 52-week high indicator provided; price_pos_20 is a 20-bar positional proxy). Position sizing rules (3-5% of portfolio max loss) are portfolio-level parameters, not entry/exit conditions.
translation_notes: Approximated '52-week high or strong uptrend' using price_pos_20 >= 0.8 (price in upper 80% of 20-bar range). Entry uses close >= sma_50 as proxy for uptrend context. Exit conditions encoded as stop loss at -15% (as decimal -0.15) and profit target at +40% (as decimal 0.40). Direction set to SHORT for contrarian short entry. The fundamental deterioration thesis and disproven thesis conditions require external, qualitative logic outside technical indicators.
